description: F1 - Minimal guided SZ: just enough to produce a valid package

messages.content: Welcome to Session Zero! What anime world would you like to play in?
I want to play in the Cowboy Bebop universe.
Great choice! Tell me about your character — who are they?
My character is Jet Black, an ex-cop bounty hunter. He's gruff but principled. He flies the Bebop and works with Spike.
Excellent! What drives Jet — what does he want most?
He wants to understand why his partner betrayed him years ago. That's his core wound.
On the Bebop, docked at Ganymede after a failed bounty. Short on food and fuel.

character_draft.name: Jet Black
character_draft.concept: Ex-cop bounty hunter haunted by betrayal
